title: App Development Assistant (AI-Assisted / "Vibe Coding") Onsite- Laguna Hills
reason: The application redirects to Indeed, which requires creating an account, signing in with an existing account, or using third-party auth (Google/Apple) to fill out and submit the application.

candidate_mapped_data.work_authorization: Authorized to work in Colombia. Ready to work onsite in Laguna Hills, CA as an independent contractor or under an authorized visa/arrangement.

screening_questions.ai_workflow_sentences: I rely on AI coding assistants like Cursor and Claude Code as high-leverage collaborative partners. I use them for rapid prototyping, translating complex design schemas into functional code, and handling repetitive boilerplates, while focusing my efforts on system design, prompt architecture, and refining AI-generated logic to maintain product quality.
screening_questions.availability_and_rate: Available to start immediately for onsite/hybrid work in Laguna Hills, CA. Rate expectations are $20.00 to $40.00 per hour (or $3,500 to $4,500 USD monthly equivalent).
